description: This file defines two mixins for visually hiding content and making it focusable when needed, primarily for accessibility purposes.

methods.name: visually-hidden
methods.description: Mixin that visually hides content but keeps it accessible to assistive technologies.

methods.name: visually-hidden-focusable
methods.description: Mixin that makes content visible only when it's focused or contains focused elements, useful for skip links and accessibility.
